overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in blue armor walking through a snow-covered Japanese village at dusk. The character interacts with a vendor at a food stall and walks alongside a child NPC through traditional wooden architecture toward a distant illuminated shrine.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered village market path with wooden stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village market area past wooden stalls and snow-covered buildings

notable_agents.action: villager sitting near wooden stall arranging items on display

entered.detail: traditional wooden market stall with thatched roof covered in snow
traditional Japanese wooden house with icicles hanging from the eaves
large wooden barrels stacked near the market stall
long icicles hanging from the roof edges of buildings
wooden planks forming a walkway through the snow-covered ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snow-covered village path lined with traditional wooden buildings and market stalls. A villager sits near a stall on the right side arranging items. The ground is covered in snow with wooden planks forming a walkway, and icicles hang from the building roofs.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall entrance with wooden deck

events.description: character stops walking to interact with vendor at food stall
character turns and resumes walking away from stall

agents.ego_description: approaching and speaking with the food vendor at the wooden stall

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing straw raincoat standing behind counter gesturing while talking

entered.detail: open-air food stall counter with bowls and cooking equipment
metal pots and bowls arranged on a wooden table
traditional paper lanterns hanging from the stall structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a food stall and stops to interact with a vendor wearing a straw raincoat. The stall features cooking utensils, bowls, and paper lanterns. After a brief interaction, the character turns and walks away from the stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: village residential alley with wooden fences

events.description: child NPC begins walking alongside and following the character

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow village alleys accompanied by a child villager

notable_agents.action: child wearing straw coat and conical hat walking alongside the character

entered.detail: tall wooden bamboo fences lining the path
woven bamboo fence along the right side of the path
low stone walls supporting the wooden structures
traditional wooden torii gate marking the entrance to another area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through narrow village passages lined with wooden fences and traditional houses, accompanied by a child NPC. The path winds between buildings with snow-covered roofs, passing stone walls and a wooden torii gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square approaching illuminated shrine

events.description: child NPC stops following and remains behind as character continues forward
approaching the warmly lit shrine building visible against the blue dusk sky

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant illuminated shrine building through the open square

entered.detail: traditional Japanese shrine building illuminated with warm orange light against the snowy dusk
tall trees covered in snow lining the path
traditional wooden street lanterns emitting warm light
tall stone wall surrounding the village area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wider village square and walks toward a distant shrine building illuminated with warm light against the snowy dusk landscape. The child NPC has remained behind, and the character continues alone past snow-covered trees and wooden lanterns toward the shrine.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, snow-covered village that gradually opens into a wide square leading toward a distant, illuminated shrine. It begins by following the character along a path of wooden planks lined with traditional buildings and icicles, passing a villager arranging items by a market stall. As the character approaches a food stall, the camera lingers on an interaction with a vendor in a straw raincoat amidst glowing paper lanterns before turning to follow the character away. The scene then shifts into winding passages between wooden fences and stone walls, where the character is accompanied by a child NPC passing under a wooden torii gate. Finally, the path expands into a spacious village square, leaving the child behind as the character walks alone past snow-covered trees and lanterns toward the warm light of the distant shrine at dusk.
